title: sharp Repository and Native libvips Package License Metadata
citation: lovell/sharp GitHub repository license metadata plus local pnpm view metadata for sharp and @img/sharp-libvips-darwin-arm64, accessed 2026-05-04.
permitted_uses: Dependency-governance evidence for deciding whether IWSDK devtools or GLTF optimization paths that depend on sharp are acceptable in the OpenClinXR sidecar.
claims_supported: The lovell/sharp GitHub repository reports Apache-2.0 license metadata.
Local pnpm metadata on 2026-05-04 reports sharp latest 0.34.5 with license Apache-2.0.
Local pnpm metadata on 2026-05-04 reports @img/sharp-libvips-darwin-arm64 latest 1.2.4 with license LGPL-3.0-or-later.
The OpenClinXR license blocker is the optional native @img/sharp-libvips-* dependency path, not sharp's direct package license.
claims_not_supported: That every transitive package in every sharp-consuming tool is acceptable under OpenClinXR policy.
That native libvips binary-package LGPL terms are approved for OpenClinXR local, CI, or production use.
That IWSDK devtools or optimizer packages may be installed before the pending native libvips exception is approved, rejected, or deferred.
